description: A candid nighttime photograph accompanying a 'REAL TRUTH vs FAKE NEWS' tweet about a Minneapolis/Hennepin County enforcement operation. It shows the rear of a dark four-door Honda sedan (the chrome Honda 'H' badge is visible on the trunk) parked on a snowy, slushy urban street at night. The car is covered in a layer of frost/road grime; a license plate reading approximately 'NJF 508' is visible. In the background are row houses with porch lights, a metal fence, a parked SUV with headlights on, and what appears to be the front of a school bus or large vehicle. There is no on-image text, no agency seal, no graphic overlay, typography, or design treatment; it is a smartphone-style snapshot of the vehicle and scene.
